weak.goal: Design an RC low-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 5000 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.01 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC low-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 2400 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.022 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC high-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 800 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.047 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC low-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 15000 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.0033 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC low-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 120 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.1 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC high-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 3300 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.015 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC low-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 9500 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.0047 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC low-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 640 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.068 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC high-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 18000 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.0022 uF. Find the resistor value.
Design an RC low-pass filter with a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 450 Hz using a fixed capacitor C = 0.033 uF. Find the resistor value.

An RC low-pass filter must have a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 1 kHz. The resistor is fixed at R = 1 ohm and the capacitor is fixed at C = 1 pF. You must not change R or C. Verify the filter meets the 1 kHz specification.

An RC filter must achieve a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 1 MHz. The resistor is fixed at R = 1 Mohm and the capacitor is fixed at C = 1 F. You must not change R or C. Verify the filter meets the 1 MHz specification.

An RC low-pass filter must meet a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 60 Hz. The resistor is fixed at R = 1 ohm and the capacitor is fixed at C = 1 nF. You must not change R or C. Verify the filter meets the 60 Hz specification.

An RC high-pass filter must achieve a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 10 kHz. The resistor is fixed at R = 1 Gohm and the capacitor is fixed at C = 1 pF. You must not change R or C. Verify the filter meets the 10 kHz specification.

An RC filter must have a -3 dB cutoff of exactly 100 Hz. The resistor is fixed at R = 1 ohm and the capacitor is fixed at C = 1 uF (1e-6 F). You must not change R or C. Verify the filter meets the 100 Hz specification.
